children.text: Decisions of the Commission, including adoption of reports and recommendations to the executive branch or to the Congress, shall be made by a majority vote of the members of the Commission present and voting. Two-thirds of the Members

children.tail: So in original. Probably should not be capitalized.
of the Commission shall constitute a quorum for purposes of conducting business.

children.text: Pub. L. 106–286, div. B, title III, § 304
